name: Stickman Climb 3D
author: Poki
description: Stickman Climb 3D brings your favorite stickman climbing challenge back, and in full 3D! Balance carefully using your pickaxe, avoid deadly traps and spikes, and make your way to the flag at the end of each level. Watch out for checkpoints, customize your stickman with new colors, vehicles, and weapons, and play solo or challenge friends for even more fun. Think you’ve got the balance and skill to reach the top? How to play Stickman Climb 3D? Use your axe to move around the stage. Reach the flag to finish it. Player 1 Move - A / D Respawn - R Player 2 Move - Left / Right arrow keys Respawn - Enter Who created Stickman Climb 3D? Stickman Climb 3D is created by No Pressure Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Crazy Bikes , Fear Response , School Bus Demolition Derby , Rocket Soccer Derby , Demolition Derby Crash Racing , Bossy Toss , Shape Rush , Crazy Cars , Crazy Cars , Battle Blast , Stickman Climb! and Stickman Climb 2 ! How can I play Stickman Climb 3D for free? You can play Stickman Climb 3D for free on Poki. Can I play Stickman Climb 3D on mobile devices and desktop? Stickman Climb 3D can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Stickman Climb 3D with my friend? Yes! Stickman Climb 3D is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
